In action
Engineered for the dip
The shape fits how you naturally hold a wing. Sauce exactly where it needs to be, every single time.
The design
Better dip angle
Deeper on the sauce side, shallower on the wing side. Full coverage every dip — no tilting, no wasted sauce.
Drop-in replacement — same supplier process
Same price range as standard cups
Bulk orders — custom packaging available
Side by side

Same sauce.
Completely different dip.

The standard cup was never built for wings. This one was.

Standard Cup
Wing forced straight down. Only the tip touches the sauce. Awkward, wasteful, unsatisfying.
✕  Tip only — partial coverage
VS
ProDipped
Wing enters at the natural angle. The deeper bowl wraps sauce all the way up the wing.
✓  Full coverage every time
Better dip. Cleaner experience.
